betaBanner.message: You're using the free beta — there will always be a free version. Some advanced features may require an account in the future.

home.subtitle: Calculate, visualize and analyze Fourier Series and Transforms with exact symbolic expressions and real-time graphical reconstruction.

series.title: Fourier Series
series.description: Periodic decomposition of piecewise functions into trigonometric, complex and half-range series, with exact symbolic coefficients.

transforms.title: Fourier Transforms
transforms.description: Spectral analysis of non-periodic signals via the continuous Fourier transform, with support prepared for the discrete transform.

calculator.title: Fourier Series
calculator.subtitle: Enter the piecewise-defined function and select the series type.

segment.continuityGap: End does not match the start of the next segment
segment.continuityWarning: Segment boundaries are not continuous — check the intervals
segment.orderError: Inverted interval — the start must be less than the end

calculator.label: Set up the function and press

settingsCanvas.editLabel: Check or uncheck rows in terms to add or subtract harmonics. Click on a row to highlight its curve.

resultPanel.indeterminateCoeffTooltip: This coefficient is indeterminate in the form 0/0. The value shown is obtained by evaluating the limit of the coefficient as n approaches the current value.
resultPanel.noSingularities: No singularities detected in the function. All coefficients are determinate.
resultPanel.noSingularitiesInDomain: No singularities detected in the integration domain.

share.title: Share link
share.description: Share this link to open the calculator with the same function and result.

transforms.title: Fourier Transform
transforms.subtitle: Compute the continuous or inverse transform of a piecewise-defined function.
transforms.complexInputNotice: Imaginary values detected — real-time preview is not available. No worries, the computed result will still be shown.
transforms.shareDescription: Share this link to open the calculator with the same function and result.
transforms.epicUrlTooLarge: URL sharing is not available for more than {{ limit }} points. Download the image or save to favorites instead.
transforms.dragToPan: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom
transforms.ftNotExists: The transform does not exist for this function (divergent integral).
transforms.iftNotExists: The inverse transform does not exist for this function.
transforms.conventionFtLabel: FT: {{ factor }} ∫ f({{ t }}) e^{−iωt} d{{ t }}
transforms.conventionIftLabel: IFT: {{ factor }} ∫ F({{ w }}) e^{iωt} d{{ w }}

dft.title: Discrete Fourier Transform
dft.subtitle: Analyze the frequency spectrum of a sampled function or a discrete sequence.
dft.algorithmNote: FFT and DFT produce the same result — FFT is O(N log N), naïve DFT is O(N²)
dft.higherN: Higher N → better approximation, more spectral coefficients
dft.manualHint: Comma-separated numbers. Count must be exactly N.
dft.spectrumNote: X axis: index k · Y axis: normalized amplitude |X[k]|/N · Hover for details
dft.dftAnyN: DFT accepts any N — power of 2 not required
dft.colWeightTitle: Relative contribution of each frequency to total amplitude
dft.placeholderDesc: Enter a function or discrete sequence, choose an algorithm and get the frequency spectrum and IDFT reconstruction.
dft.freeSymbolsWarning: DFT requires numeric expressions. Remove free symbols: {{ symbols }}

epicycles.drawMode: Draw mode — click and drag to trace a shape
epicycles.drawHint: Click and drag on the canvas to trace your shape. Release when done.
epicycles.textareaHint: One x,y pair per line. Minimum 3 points.
epicycles.coeffsHint: Highlighted rows = active top-K. Click to isolate.
epicycles.phaseToggleHint: Click to toggle between radians/π and degrees

history.title: My calculations
history.emptyAll: You have not made any calculations yet
history.freeTierBanner: Your free plan includes access to your last {{ max }} calculations and {{ favorites }} favorites.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password

forgotPassword.sentMessage: If {{ email }} is registered, you will receive a link within a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: New password

resetPassword.successMessage: You can now log in with your new password.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your account is active. You can now log in and calculate Fourier series.

verifyBanner.message: Verify your email {{ email }} to be able to run calculations.

profile.title: My profile
profile.googleNoPassword: Your account uses Google sign-in — password change is not available.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: This action is permanent. Your account, history, and favorites will be deleted.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. Your account and all your data will be permanently deleted.

home.title: Fourier Series and Transform Calculator
home.description: Symbolic Fourier series and transform calculator. Exact coefficients, real-time graphs and support for piecewise functions.

calculator.title: Fourier Series Calculator
calculator.description: Calculate trigonometric, complex and half-range Fourier series with exact symbolic coefficients and interactive graphical reconstruction.

transforms.title: Continuous Fourier Transform Calculator
transforms.description: Calculate the continuous Fourier transform and its inverse symbolically. Visualize the amplitude and phase spectrum in real time.

dft.title: DFT — Discrete Fourier Transform Calculator
dft.description: Calculate the DFT with amplitude and phase spectrum visualization and signal reconstruction via epicycles.

about.title: About
about.description: Discover everything Fourier Web Calculator can do: Fourier series, continuous and discrete transforms, epicycles, math keyboard and more.

dev.title: Dev Sandbox
dev.description: Development environment for testing endpoints and components.

survey.title: Usage survey
survey.subtitle: First of all, thank you for trying the app. All data is for statistical purposes only.
survey.successMessage: Your response has been recorded. It helps us understand who uses the tool and how to improve it.

hero.title: About Fourier Web Calculator
hero.intro: A free, open-access web tool for computing, visualizing and sharing Fourier analysis — designed for students, engineers and scientists.

series.title: Fourier Series
series.desc: Decompose any piecewise function into a Fourier series and get the exact symbolic coefficients with an interactive graph.
series.f1: Trigonometric, complex exponential and half-range (sine / cosine) series
series.f2: Multi-segment piecewise functions with continuity validation between pieces
series.f3: Exact symbolic coefficients computed by the Maxima CAS engine
series.f5: Interactive plot with real-time partial-sum reconstruction
series.f6: Coefficient table with LaTeX and Maxima expressions
series.f7: Export results as image, LaTeX code, CSV or Maxima script
series.f8: Share your result with a unique permanent link
series.f9: Apply symbolic simplifications to the resulting series expressions
series.f10: Supports free parameters (e.g. a·x, sin(n·t)) — vary them with interactive sliders after computing

transforms.title: Continuous Transforms
transforms.desc: Compute exact symbolic transforms of piecewise signals, including special functions.
transforms.f1: Bilateral continuous Fourier transform (ℱ) and its inverse (ℱ⁻¹)
transforms.f3: Piecewise input supporting u(·), sgn(·), rect(·), δ(·)
transforms.f4: Exact symbolic results via Maxima CAS
transforms.f5: Interactive graphs of the original function and its transform
transforms.f7: Plot the real part, imaginary part and absolute value of both the function and its transform independently
transforms.f8: View results in multiple forms: magnitude, phase, real/imaginary component expressions
transforms.f9: Supports free parameters (e.g. a·t, sin(ω·t)) — vary them with interactive sliders after computing

dft.title: Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT)
dft.desc: Analyze signals numerically with the DFT, visualize the spectrum and watch the epicycles animation.
dft.f1: Three input modes: function sampling, manual data entry and epicycles
dft.f2: Function mode: numeric sampling of piecewise functions (u, sgn, rect supported)
dft.f3: Manual mode: enter any number of samples by hand
dft.f4: Epicycles mode: watch the DFT come to life as rotating complex vectors that trace any closed figure
dft.f7: IDFT signal reconstruction from DFT coefficients
dft.f8: Export each chart independently and share results
dft.f9: Draw any shape by hand on the canvas and see it reconstructed as a Fourier epicycle animation in real time

input.title: Math Input
input.desc: Enter expressions in LaTeX with a full-featured keyboard on any device.
input.f1: Interactive LaTeX editor powered by MathQuill
input.f2: Desktop toolbar with operators, functions, Greek letters and constants
input.f3: Mobile touchscreen keyboard: numeric, trig, f(x), full QWERTY + shift, Greek letters
input.f4: Supported functions: sin, cos, tan, sinh, cosh, asin, acos, atan, exp, log, ln, √, u(·), sgn(·), rect(·), n!, Γ(·)

account.title: Accounts & History
account.desc: Create a free account to save and revisit your calculations at any time.
account.f1: Calculation history with full result recovery
account.f3: Weekly quota system with a generous free tier
account.f4: Export your calculation history as CSV

ux.title: Design & Usability
ux.desc: A focused, distraction-free interface that adapts to your device and preferences.
ux.f2: Two color palettes: Neutral and Coffee
ux.f4: Responsive design — works on desktop and mobile
